title: Embed work-doc inside dashboard
excerpt: I’d like to have the ability to embed a work doc inside a dashboard

posts.author: mirmelsh (Roi Mirmelshtein)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to have the ability to embed a work doc inside a dashboard

posts.author: pjimenez (Pedro Jimenez)
posts.cookedHtml: The Text widget is very limiting in terms of formatting, integration with the platform and it doesn’t even have spellcheck. I completely agree that having a Workdoc embed in a dashboard will help provide visibility on important project information instead of it being buried in a table.

posts.author: JuliaBakhuis (Julia Bakhuis)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to have the link of the monday doc being possible to use in the embedded widget in dashboarding as well.

Like it is currently working with the monday form, so you can fill out the form from the embedded widget, it would be great to have this also available for the Monday Doc. So you can work from the dashboard widget.
